reviews.comment:

A place with excellent service from the beach attendants and the confectionery shop. Spectacular restrooms.

Cómodo limpio y buena atención sobre toda las cosas .

(Translated by Google)
Comfortable, clean and good service above all things.

reviews.comment:
BIEN ESTA ACA ME GUSTA PORQUE VENDEN PRODUCTOS REGIONALES, NUECES DEL LUGAR, ALIMENTOS DEL LUGAR, DULCES REGIONALES, ALFAJORES REGIONALES. ESO ES LO QUE UNO BUSCA CUANDO LLEGA A UNA CIUDAD ANQUE SEA DE PASO.

(Translated by Google)
This place is great. I like it because they sell regional products: local nuts, local foods, regional sweets, and regional alfajores. That's what you look for when you arrive in a city, even if you're just passing through.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9804125904812315909/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNGcTVIVmZREAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
